rows.brief: Build a team chat app where companies create workspaces, users join channels and DMs, send messages with attachments, and stay connected in real-time. Production product, not a demo.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Handle user registration, login, and profile management securely.

modules_detailed.title: Workspace Management
modules_detailed.description: Allow companies to create and manage multiple workspaces efficiently.

modules_detailed.title: Channel & DM System
modules_detailed.description: Implement channels and direct messaging for real-time communication.

modules_detailed.title: Message Handling
modules_detailed.description: Support sending text messages and attachments seamlessly.

modules_detailed.title: Real-Time Updates
modules_detailed.description: Ensure real-time message delivery and notifications across users.

modules_detailed.title: User Roles & Permissions
modules_detailed.description: Define roles (admin/user) with specific permissions per workspace.

modules_detailed.title: Search & Archive
modules_detailed.description: Enable search functionality for channels and messages for easy access.

nels and messages for easy access.

rows.brief: Build a fast issue tracker for software teams. Users create issues, assign owners, move them through statuses on a board, and see updates live as teammates work. Long-term product, multiple companies use it.

rows.brief: Build a realtime multiplayer collaborative whiteboard. Multiple users see each other's cursors, edit shapes together with no flicker, comment, share via link. Production product, teams use it daily.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure login and registration for users with various authentication methods.

modules_detailed.title: Real-time collaboration
modules_detailed.description: Implement real-time updating of the whiteboard for multiple users.

modules_detailed.description: Provide various drawing tools such as shapes, text, and markers.

modules_detailed.title: Commenting system
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to add and view comments on specific board areas.

modules_detailed.title: Link sharing
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to share the whiteboard link for easy access.

modules_detailed.title: User interface
modules_detailed.description: Design an intuitive and responsive UI for seamless user experience.

review.note: Quality assurance is needed to ensure system reliability.

rows.brief: Build a financial dashboard for a fintech: customers see accounts, transactions, transfer money between accounts, set up scheduled payments, view statements. Production banking-grade product, regulated environment.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage secure user access and authentication for account access.

modules_detailed.title: Account Overview
modules_detailed.description: Display user accounts with balances and transaction history.

modules_detailed.title: Funds Transfer
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to transfer money between their accounts securely.

modules_detailed.title: Scheduled Payments
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to set up and manage recurring payment schedules.

modules_detailed.title: Statements Generation
modules_detailed.description: Generate and present financial statements to users in a user-friendly manner.

modules_detailed.title: Compliance Module
modules_detailed.description: Ensure product meets regulatory requirements and compliance standards.

review.note: User authentication is properly covered in the draft.

rows.brief: Build an ERP for mid-size manufacturers: inventory, purchase orders, invoices, general ledger, customer/vendor records, basic HR, role-based access. Used by 50-500 employees per company. Production, long-term contract.

modules_detailed.title: Inventory Management
modules_detailed.description: Manage stock levels, product details, and suppliers efficiently.

modules_detailed.title: Purchase Orders
modules_detailed.description: Facilitate creation, tracking, and management of purchase orders.

modules_detailed.title: Invoicing System
modules_detailed.description: Generate and manage invoices for customer transactions.

modules_detailed.title: General Ledger
modules_detailed.description: Maintain financial records and ensure accurate bookkeeping.

modules_detailed.title: Customer/Vendor Records
modules_detailed.description: Store detailed information about customers and vendors.

modules_detailed.title: Basic HR Module
modules_detailed.description: Manage employee records, payroll, and HR processes.

modules_detailed.title: Role-Based Access
modules_detailed.description: Implement security levels for user access and permissions.

review.note: User authentication is essential for ERP systems to secure sensitive data.

review.note: Data persistence is crucial for maintaining reliable records across the ERP.

review.note: Admins need tools for operational oversight and user support.

review.note: Monitoring is vital for maintaining system performance and reliability.

review.note: Infrastructure setup is necessary for smooth deployment and operations.

review.note: Billing management is essential for financial transactions in ERP.

suggested_module.description: Handle API integrations and webhook responses.

review.note: Integrations with external systems are important for data exchange.
AI orchestration is not relevant for the current ERP system.

suggested_module.title: Reliability Features
suggested_module.description: Implement recovery strategies like retries and backups.

review.note: Reliable recovery processes are critical for a robust ERP.

suggested_module.description: Ensure data protection compliance and secure access.

review.note: Compliance with data protection is essential for operational integrity.
Collaboration features are unnecessary for this ERP product.
Notifications are not critical for the core ERP functions.

suggested_module.description: Provide dashboards and BI integration capabilities.

review.note: Analytics are important for decision-making within the ERP.

suggested_module.title: Quality Assurance
suggested_module.description: Implement testing strategies for edge cases and error handling.

review.note: QA processes are critical to ensure software reliability.

pass2_review.summary_note: The draft scope lacks several critical operational components necessary for a robust ERP system. It needs to address authentication, data persistence, and reliability through additional modules.
